summary: Date filter bug fix testing. Fixed critical ReferenceError in AdsIntelTab.jsx (metaEnabled accessed before initialization). All backend tests pass. Date filter apply triggers Meta sync correctly. Campaign table shows LIVE/PAUSED badges and all 4 pixel event columns.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: AdsIntelTab.jsx had `const metaEnabled` declared after `handleApply` useCallback that referenced it — JavaScript TDZ (Temporal Dead Zone) error caused crash on tab load. Moved metaEnabled declaration before handleApply.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — date filter, sync, campaign table all working

test_credentials: admin / admin123 (note: admin@mygenie.online no longer works, use 'admin')
seed_data_creation: Meta API sync run during testing — 12 rows synced for 2026-06-21 to 2026-06-26
context_for_next_testing_agent: AdsIntelTab TDZ bug fixed. Date filter + Meta sync flow fully tested: setting 2026-06-21 to 2026-06-26 dates + Apply triggers sync showing 'Syncing...' state then sync result banner with row counts. Campaign table shows 2 LIVE campaigns with all 4 pixel event columns. Backend sync endpoint accepts date_from/date_to query params correctly. test_credentials.md needs updating: correct username is 'admin' not 'admin@mygenie.online'.
rca_of_issue: AdsIntelTab.jsx: `const metaEnabled = mcpStatus?.meta?.enabled` was declared on line 89 (after the component return), but `handleApply` useCallback on line 38 referenced `metaEnabled`. In JavaScript, `const` has a Temporal Dead Zone — it cannot be accessed before its declaration in the same scope, causing ReferenceError at runtime. Fix: moved `metaEnabled` declaration to line 24, immediately after `const h = ...` and before any callbacks.
